# reLU(with:name:)

**Instance Method**

Computes the ReLU (rectified linear activation unit) function with the input tensor.

## Declaration

```swift
func reLU(with tensor: MPSGraphTensor, name: String?) -> MPSGraphTensor
```

## Parameters

- **tensor**: The input tensor.
- **name**: The name for the operation.

## Return Value

A valid [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraphTensor] object.

## Discussion

The operation is:  f(x) = max(x, 0).
title: reLU(with:name:)
